titleStmt.title: SII 18.76: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 76. (B.K. No. 27 of 1933-34.) KĀGINELLI, HIREKERUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva is dated in Śaka 993, Virōdhikṛit, Pushya, Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrāṅti, lunar eclipse (evidently mistake for solar eclipse). On that day there was no solar eclipse nor did the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti occur. The tithi corresponded to A.D. 1072, January 22 Sunday, f.d.t., ·15.

It registers a gift of taxes, oil, rice and money made to god Grāmēśvaradēva by pergaḍe Kaṁka (written on account of euphony as Gaṁka), and others. It also, records the grant of land made by Jakkagāvuṇḍa of Kāgenele for worship and offerings to the same god and for the feeding of students and teachers. The gift which is stated to have been made at the instance of Daṇḍanāyaka Appachayya, the officer in charge of vaḍḍarāvuḷa tax was entrusted to Sadyōjāta-paṇḍita of the temple. The king's subordinates pergaḍe Chāvuṇḍayya, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Barmadēva and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Parikantadēva, both described as ‘lord of Banavāsi’, are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © . Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō ttarābhivri
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁcamahā
śabda mahāsāmantādhipati mā(ma)hāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmatu vaḍḍarāvuḻa dappacayyaṁgaḷa be

sadi samastaguṇasaṁpannarappa perggaḍe cāvuṇḍayyaṁgaḻuṁ . samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamā
na mānōṁnata prabhumantrōtsāhasaktitrayasaṁpaṁna vibdhaprasaṁnaṁ mahādēvapā dābjaśilīmukhaṁ caturacaturmmukhaṁ gōtrabha
gīrathaṁ samadamahārathaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī matpaṁnāyada perggaḍe mahānāgayyanuṁ © . kanda . tattaneyana
vanīvaḷayadoḷuttamikege niḷeyamenisi sāhasadiṁdudvrittāridarppadaḷananudāttaya śaṁ dēvanāḷanīvaradēvaṁ . mattaṁ samastaguṇasaṁpannarappa
śrīmatperjjuṁkada perggaḍe vāvaṇayyana candimayyana besadiṁ samastaguṇasaṁpannarappa perggaḍe biṭṭamayya gōvindayya pramukhakaraṇamuṁ .
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipurādhīśvaraṁ nāmādisamasta prasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ barmmadēvanuṁ .
sumadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipurādhīśvaraṁ bhuvanaikamalladēva dēvakīnandanavainatēyaṁ saucāṁjanēyaṁ .
duṣṭamaṇḍaḷikaśirakkarttari tōyigana kēsari nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanma hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ parikanta
dēvaruṁ . samastaguṇasaṁpanna vibudhaprasanma mahādēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ paranārī dūraṁ sa(ṁ)tyarādhēyaṁ saucagāṁ
gēyaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁga nijakuḷakamaḷinīmārttaṇḍaṁ pagevara gaṇḍaṁ (.) nāmādisamastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmatkāgeneleya jakkagāvuṇḍaṁ . © kanda . tekkane tīvirddavuḍā mukkaḷi salu bārteyaltu polageṟe lubdhaṁ lakkapa
tiyāgi paḷamaṁ jakkiganaṁtucitamaṟiva dānigaḷoḷarē . bakkuḍiyalēno janakkīvaḍe gāytavarmmatanayaṁ jakkaṁ
mikkaṁ surabhūjakkaṁ parusakkameseva cintāmaṇigaṁ . © . Ātana perggaḍe vinayasamētaṁ kavigamakivādivāgmibrajasaṁ
prītaṁ patihitavinatājātanenalnegardanalte mādeyanāḷaṁ . maḷinajaḷadoḷage puṭṭade viḷasadu budhahrideyameṁba ko
ḷadalpuṭṭirddeḷedaḷisi baḷadu vikasitadaḷamenisida padmavanamarāḷaṁ kāḷaṁ . © . Ātana tammana vinayabrā
tamadennaḷave pogaḷalaticaturakavivrātarenisirdda kumudavrātakke śaśāṁkanalte perggaḍe ga ṁkaṁ . kaṁ . Abhimāna
da peṁpindaṁ prabhumaṁtrōtsāhasaktiyindaṁ dharegatyabhinutanāgi na bhūtō na bhaviśya ti yeni
panalte perggaḍe gaṁkaṁ . © kāḷigana tammanurvvīpāḷakaraṁ mecce nuḍidu perggaḍe gaṁkaṁ śūḷige rurusira dai
tyakapāḷige suṁkaṁgaḷellama padedittaṁ . mattaṁ pannavaṇada dāsiseṭṭiyuṁ nagaramuṁ motta
kāṟa rēviseṭṭiyuṁ . telligaruṁ cēleya gātrada modalaseṭṭigaḷuṁ vūreḷpadiṁbaruṁ yintivare
llavī dharmmakkanukūlarāgi © svasti sakavariṣa 993 virōdhikritsaṁvatsarada puṣya damavāsye
Ādityavāraduttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti sōmagrahaṇa vyatīpātadandu grāmēśvaradēvara dīpa
dhūpa nivēdya jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ tapōdhavarggaṁ vidyārttigaḷigaṁ nelavarttiyaḍakeya leraḍu lakkada suṁkamu
maṁ gātradalondeleya pēṟina suṁkamumaṁ gātrada modalaseṭṭigaḷondu paṇamumaṁ pannavaṇada dāsiseṭṭi
gātradalondu pēṟinaripada lekkamumaṁ nagaravaṁgaḍiyalondu soṁṭigeyakki yumaṁ telli
garellaṁ gāṇadalondu soṁṭige yaṇneymaṁ . mottakāṟaṁ dariśinada paṇamumaṁ koṭṭaru matta . v® .
Ī sakaḷōrvviyalnegardda jakkanumāramaṇaṁge bhaktiyiṁ lēsenisirdda garddeyare ttattaranittanadūra
mūḍaluṁ kāseyagaṭṭameṁba keṟeyiṁ keḷagirppudanuṁṇbarīśanuṁ dēsigachātraruṁ ma
ṭada jīyaru� nela nēsaṟuḷḷinaṁ . kaṁ . Agajādhīśaṁgā garddege baḍagaṇa beḻdalondu mattarani
ttaṁ jagadoḷaticatura kaliyugadoḷu jakkigana doreya dānigaḷoḷare . Antā keyyaṁ śrī
majjakkigāvuṇḍanu yeḷpadiṁbarumirddu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
raṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrīmat grāmēsvaradēgulada sadyō
jātapaṇḍitadēvarakālaṁ karccidhārāpūrvvakadiṁ koṭṭarintī dharmmamanāvanānumō
rvva pratipāḷisida vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalsāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagmaṁ paṁ
caratnadalkaṭṭisi sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarige koṭṭa phaḷamakku yī dharmmamanaḷidanāta
nā puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷmaṁ vēdapāragarumaṁ sāsira kavileyumanaḷida paṁcamahāpā
takanakku . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyaṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavaddhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . kavatāḷa cāvuṇḍē
svarada pratibaddha . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
